title: marianthus mollis
intro: Marianthus mollis, also known as the silver fern or New Zealand fern, is a flowering plant native to New Zealand, characterized by its silvery-green leaves and small white flowers. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in reducing inflammation and improving digestion. The health benefits of Marianthus mollis include its ability to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) and support liver health. Marianthus mollis is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties.
